title: trapa rossica var. pseudorossica
intro: Trapa rossica var. pseudorossica, also known as the Russian water chestnut or water caltrop, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Trapaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trapa rossica var. pseudorossica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
